message:
fix(web): prevent misleading stats display when sequence too short

GCSkewOverlay was showing origin/terminus stats even when
cumulative.length < 2 (sequence too short for analysis), resulting
in misleading "~0 bp" values alongside the "sequence too short"
empty state message.

Changed condition from `result` to `hasData` so stats only show
when analysis completed successfully with valid cumulative data.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
